subject: Small round-faced figure with white complexion and circular red cheek markings in a green outfit, cheerful expression
description: A small, round-bodied figure with a distinctive white spherical face, large circular red cheek markings, and small black eyes stands in a cheerful pose. The figure wears a green outfit and cap. The background is full of sparkle and shine effects suggesting a festive or tournament atmosphere. The overall impression is one of warmth and friendliness despite the small stature.
foreground: Small round figure in green outfit with distinctive white face and red cheeks
